name: Compare workers comp vs personal injury for work chemical exposure?

mainEntity.name: Compare workers comp vs personal injury for work chemical exposure?

acceptedAnswer.description: **Comp: no-fault, quick medical/wages, can't sue employer.** PI: fault-based, sue third-parties for pain/damages[2]. **Key factors:** Comp exclusive for employer; dual track common. **Practical guidance:** File comp first, add PI. Attorney manages both. **Comp safer start.**
